plot outline: Dr. Ryan Stone (Sandra Bullock) is a brilliant medical engineer on her first shuttle mission, with veteran astronaut Matt Kowalski (George Clooney) in command of his last flight before retiring. But on a seemingly routine spacewalk, disaster strikes. The shuttle is destroyed, leaving Stone and Kowalsky completely alone - tethered to nothing but each other and spiraling out into the blackness.
title: Gravity

distributors.name: Columbia TriStar Warner Filmes de Portugal

other companies.name: International Alliance of Theatrical Stage Employees (IATSE)
